memoryArtifacts.headline: Mary Moulton
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas Moulton of Hampton, New Hampshire, brought with him to York in 1655 his wife and at least four of his children:
Abigail (1645-1692) who married  Henry Simpson and was killed with him in the Mas …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Moulton於1651年1月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓時，她的父親Thomas Moulton11648歲，母親Martha41歲。她於1670年與Mainwaring Hilton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1725年11月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克享年74歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克約克笛卡爾 帕里什 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Moulton于1651年1月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓时，她的父亲Thomas Moulton11648岁，母亲Martha41岁。她于1670年与Mainwaring Hilton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1725年11月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克享年74岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克約克笛卡爾 帕里什 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1652: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Moulton was born on 25 January 1651, in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Moulton, was 11648 and her mother, Martha, was 41. She married Mainwaring Hilton in 1670, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in November 1725, in York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Old Parish Cemetery, York, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Moulton est née le 25 janvier 1651, à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Moulton, avait 11648 ans et sa mère, Martha, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Mainwaring Hilton en 1670, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en novembre 1725, à York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Parish Cemetery, York, York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Moulton am 25. Januar 1651 in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Moulton 11648 und ihre Mutter Martha 41. Sie hat 1670 in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mainwaring Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im November 1725 im Alter von 74 Jahren in York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Parish Cemetery, York, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Moulton è nata il il 25 gennaio 1651 nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Moulton, aveva 11648 anni e sua madre, Martha, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Mainwaring Hilton nel 1670, nel York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel novembre 1725, nel York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Parish Cemetery, York, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Moultonが1651年1月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Moultonは11648歳，母Marthaは41歳であった。1670年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークでMainwaring Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1725年11月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークで74歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークヨークオルド パーイッシュ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Moulton(이)가 1651년 1월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Moulton(은)는 11648세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1670년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 Mainwaring Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1725년 11월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 요르크 드 파리시 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Moulton nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1651, em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Moulton, tinha 11648 anos e sua mãe, Martha, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Mainwaring Hilton em 1670, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1725, em York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Parish Cemetery, York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Moulton родилась 25 января 1651 г. в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Moulton было 11648 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mainwaring Hilton в 1670 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла ноябрь 1725 г. в местности ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности олд пэриш кеметири, ерк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Moulton nació el 25 de enero de 1651, en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Moulton, tenía 11648 años y su mamá, Martha, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Mainwaring Hilton en 1670, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en noviembre de 1725, en York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Old Parish Cemetery, York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
